name: jackui-desktop
description: JackUI Desktop — streaming de torrents com transcode por hardware

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others "npm run dev:backend" "sleep 2 && npm run dev:electron"
scripts.build:electron: npm run build:go && npm run build:frontend && npx electron-builder --config electron/builder.config.ts
scripts.pack: npm run build:go && npm run build:frontend && npx electron-builder --config electron/builder.config.ts --dir
